free_text: Inelastic collision and transport cross sections for
some light elements
Main reference.
Journal publication, minutes.
Abstract only, no data.
Reactor spectrum from 1 to 7 MeV, maximum is around 2
MeV.
No details on sources of uncertainties.

Table I, page 4 of report LA-1339,1951.
The inelastic collision cross section is arrived at
by comparing the total cross section sigmat as
measuredly a transmission-type experiment with the
total elastic scattering cross section obtained
separately by integrating a measured angular
distribution of scattered neutrons over the entire
sphere.
